contentitemdata.dancinggoat.endorsement.EndorsementQuote: The Porlex Tall is one of those grinders that punches above its weight. The ceramic burrs produce a surprisingly consistent grind for a manual grinder, which is essential if you want balanced extraction. I also like the larger capacity compared to smaller travel grinders—it’s enough for a couple cups without sacrificing portability. For anyone who values fresh coffee at home or on the road, it’s a simple, durable tool that just works
